title: elekmania picardae
side_effects: Elekmania picardae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to the release of toxic compounds into the bloodstream. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to respiratory failure, cardiovascular collapse, and even death. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and liver damage. Furthermore, improper use of Elekmania picardae can interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, and anxiety disorders.
